verses.arabic: بِّسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنَٰهُ فِى لَيْلَةِ ٱلْقَدْرِ
verses.english: Indeed, We sent the Qur'an down during the Night of Decree.
And what can make you know what is the Night of Decree?

verses.arabic: لَيْلَةُ ٱلْقَدْرِ خَيْرٌۭ مِّنْ أَلْفِ شَهْرٍۢ
verses.english: The Night of Decree is better than a thousand months.

verses.arabic: تَنَزَّلُ ٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ فِيهَا بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهِم مِّن كُلِّ أَمْرٍۢ
verses.english: The angels and the Spirit descend therein by permission of their Lord for every matter.
Peace it is until the emergence of dawn.
